name: @codegraphy-dev/plugin-particles
description: CodeGraphy graph background particle effects plugin

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.build.json --emitDeclarationOnly && node ../../scripts/build-workspace-package.mjs src/plugin.ts dist/plugin.js && pnpm exec esbuild src/effects.ts --bundle --platform=browser --format=esm --target=es2020 --outfile=dist/effects.js --sourcemap && pnpm exec esbuild src/webview.ts --bundle --platform=browser --format=esm --target=es2020 --outfile=dist/webview.js --sourcemap

disclosures: Contains canvas particle routines adapted from Odysseus, which is AGPL-3.0 licensed.
